title: Tender Twice Norwegian Potatoes Fritters
description: Rich and creamy Norwegian potato fritters deep-fried to a golden crisp, served with a sweet sugar syrup, this dish is a cozy delight, and its sattvic friendly ingredients make it a great option for those following an ayurvedic diet.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine grated potatoes, chopped onion, flour, and eggs, mix well to form a smooth batter.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the potato batter into the hot oil, do not overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters until they are golden brown, about 3-4 minutes on each side.
Remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a small saucepan, combine sugar and water, heat over medium heat, stirring until the sugar dissolves.
Bring the sugar syrup to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Serve the potato fritters warm with the sweet sugar syrup drizzled over the top.
